Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys cells = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for i, cell in enumerate\(cells\): src = cell['source'] if any\(k in src for k in ['total_orders', 'value_counts', 'describe', 'segment_counts']\): outputs = cell.get\('outputs', []\) if outputs: print\(f'=== CELL {i} SOURCE ==='\) print\(src[:300]\) print\('--- OUTPUT ---'\) for o in outputs: if 'text' in o: print\(''.join\(o['text']\)[:500]\) elif 'data' in o and 'text/plain' in o['data']: print\(''.join\(o['data']['text/plain']\)[:500]\) print\(\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys cells = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for i, cell in enumerate\(cells\): src = cell['source'] if 'total_orders' in src and 'describe' in src or \('total_orders' in src and 'quantile' in src\) or \('client_pivot' in src and 'describe' in src\): outputs = cell.get\('outputs', []\) print\(f'=== CELL {i} ==='\) print\(src[:400]\) if outputs: for o in outputs: if 'text' in o: print\('OUT:', ''.join\(o['text']\)[:600]\) elif 'data' in o and 'text/plain' in o['data']: print\('OUT:', ''.join\(o['data']['text/plain']\)[:600]\) print\(\) ")
